headline: Coastal bathymetry with Sentinel-2 presented at WACV 2025
body: New paper From Bands to Depth: Understanding Bathymetry Decisions on Sentinel-2 presented at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2025).

headline: Vapor–liquid equilibrium of water–hydrogen mixtures published in PLOS ONE
body: BuckAI modeling study on H₂–water VLE using a Cubic-Plus-Association Equation-of-State is now available in PLOS ONE, supporting natural hydrogen reservoir research.

headline: BuckAI Innovation & Data Visualization Space opens in Mendenhall Laboratory
body: The Observatory's dedicated collaboration and visualization space officially opens, providing a hub for weekly research seminars, GPU-powered analysis, and visitor demos.

headline: BuckAI Observatory founded with $1M OSU seed investment
body: The BuckAI Observatory is officially launched as OSU's interdisciplinary center for AI-powered Earth observation, with five-year seed funding (2025–2030) from the College of Arts and Sciences.

headline: CGIAR/SPIA deforestation monitoring project awarded ($1.25M, 2025–2028)
body: Three-year collaborative grant to develop AI satellite tools for tracking deforestation and agroforestry in Sub-Saharan Africa, in partnership with the CGIAR Standing Panel on Impact Assessment.

headline: AI mapping of natural hydrogen reservoirs presented at AGU Fall Meeting
body: Semantic segmentation of 'fairy circles' (semicircular depressions) using SAM + Sentinel-2 + Copernicus DEM presented at AGU. Covered by New Scientist, EurekAlert, and 10+ international outlets. Industry partner: Koloma Inc.

headline: River classification at sub-meter resolution published in Remote Sensing of Environment
body: Fully convolutional neural networks applied to WorldView/QuickBird commercial imagery (30 cm) achieve >90% precision and recall for river mapping, enabling tracking of Arctic river dynamics.
